title: rpm-spec: use skopeo-containers instead of containers-common
body:
skopeo-containers is available everywhere, but not containers-common

Signed-off-by: Lokesh Mandvekar <lsm5@fedoraproject.org>

comments.body:
:pushpin: Commit 7d309fa has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan 7d309fa0f03d8054a03d99fa9acec1762f76c4f0 -->

:sunny: Test successful - [status-papr](https://s3.amazonaws.com/aos-ci/ghprb/containers/libpod/f1b4f43d7521c33551669d7f889012fcba4ec926.1535114468751784192/index.html)
Approved by: rhatdan
Pushing f1b4f43d7521c33551669d7f889012fcba4ec926 to master...

@TomSweeneyRedHat containers-common exists everywhere except rhel7 atm. But the new package does `Provides: skopeo-containers` as well, so this PR should be valid even after rename.

@fkluknav could you please rename skopeo-containers to containers-common
